finding: T7 repairs Roadmap Autopilot only; it does not establish shared queue-writer serialization across every workflow that mutates ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.

evidence.observation: uses concurrency group bem949-queue-writer and retry/rebase
writes ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and pushes directly, with no concurrency group or retry loop
uses a different concurrency group and direct push; its persist step includes git pull --rebase

limitations: No shared cross-workflow lock or live cross-workflow race test exists.
This addendum does not invalidate the narrower T7 static repair evidence.
required_before_unattended_queue_mutatio: Put every queue-writing workflows in one shared serialization/retry protocol, or disable the other writers.
